name: Git Commands 2
description: Test your knowledge on basic Git workflow and version control concepts.

questions.question: Which command is used to create a new branch named 'feature-login' and switch to it immediately?
How do you combine the history of 'feature-branch' into your current active branch?
Which command downloads updates from a remote repository but does NOT integrate them into your local work?
In the context of GitHub/GitLab, what is a 'Pull Request' (or Merge Request)?
options: A command to force download all files from a server.
A request to delete a branch after finishing a task.
A proposed set of changes to a repository that can be reviewed before merging.
A specialized script to automate git commits.

questions.question: What happens when Git cannot automatically decide how to combine changes during a merge?
Which command is used to upload your local branch commits to a remote repository?
How do you delete a local branch named 'old-feature' after it has been merged?
Which command integrates the latest changes from the remote 'main' branch into your current branch?
